title: Update Desi Mango 10 kg box price to ₹350 in PreOrderForm

requirements.summary: Update Desi Mango 10 kg box price from current value to ₹350, ensuring dynamic total price calculation and WhatsApp message reflect the new price while keeping all other variant prices unchanged
acceptanceCriteria: When 'Desi Mango' and '10 kg box' are selected, the dynamic total price displays ₹350 × quantity.
The pre-filled WhatsApp message sent on form submission correctly states ₹350 per box for Desi Mango 10 kg box orders.
Desi Mango 5 kg box price remains ₹200 per box with no change.
Kesar Mango pricing (both 5 kg and 10 kg box) remains unchanged.
Total price calculation updates correctly in real time as quantity changes with this combination selected.

file_operations.description: Update the pricing logic for Desi Mango 10 kg box variant to ₹350 per box. Locate the price calculation function or data structure that determines unit price based on mangoVariant and packagingSize. Change the Desi Mango + 10 kg box combination price from its current value to 350. Ensure the dynamic total price calculation (unitPrice × quantity) uses this new value. Update the WhatsApp message template generation to correctly format ₹350 per box for Desi Mango 10 kg box orders. Verify that Desi Mango 5 kg box remains at ₹200 and that Kesar Mango pricing for both 5 kg and 10 kg boxes remains unchanged.
